windows.transcript: we achieve the candlesthetics we're looking for. Then they're topped off with a little more wax. Once the candles are topped, they're ready to be
windows.embed_text_v2: Finished orange wax Yankee Candle large jar candles travel along factory roller conveyor past pallet jacks, stacked boxes, yellow mezzanine, ending at case-packing where sealed cardboard shipping cartons exit on conveyor.
windows.summary_v2: Yankee Candle factory conveyor lines carry finished orange-wax jar candles through the warehouse toward case-packing in cardboard boxes.

tags_v2.action: conveying finished jar candles toward packing

seconds_v2.desc: Factory conveyor with rows of large clear glass jars filled with orange wax; stacked cardboard boxes on a red pallet jack in the background warehouse.
Camera pans showing Raymond pallet jack and stacks of labeled brown boxes beside the conveyor of orange-wax filled jars.
Conveyor line of orange/yellow wax-filled glass jars stretching down the factory aisle past pallet of boxes.
Close on Yankee Candle labeled large jar candles with orange wax on a roller conveyor; warehouse racking visible behind.
Wider shot of the Yankee Candle conveyor with yellow stair railing; rows of orange-wax jars moving through the factory.
Conveyor continues carrying Yankee Candle large-format jars; mezzanine and warehouse racking in background.
Side angle of Yankee Candle jars on roller conveyor below yellow industrial mezzanine.
Wider view of orange Yankee Candle jars moving along the conveyor under the yellow factory mezzanine framework.
Sealed cardboard shipping boxes labeled TOP move along a conveyor in a darker packing area, signalling case-packing of finished candles.
